relations.npc29_cheng_siyuan: 写作和调研的灵感交换

profile.innate_zh: 富有想象力、共情力强、语言天赋突出
profile.learned_zh: 长期写作训练形成的敏锐观察力，习惯用文字解构日常
profile.learned_en: Keen observation from years of writing; deconstructs daily life through words
profile.belief_zh: 文字是理解世界最诚实的方式
profile.belief_en: Words are the most honest way to understand the world
profile.goal_zh: 出版自己的第一本短篇小说集
profile.contradiction_zh: 渴望被阅读 vs 害怕被误读
profile.contradiction_en: Craves to be read vs. fears being misread
profile.deep_zh: 内心戏剧化，渴望深度连接却害怕暴露脆弱
profile.deep_en: Dramatic inner world; craves deep connection yet fears exposing vulnerability
profile.lifestyle_zh: 晚睡晚起型，夜间创作效率最高
profile.lifestyle_en: Night owl; most productive in late-night writing
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午缓慢启动，下午平稳，夜间爆发
profile.rhythm_en: Slow mornings, steady afternoons, explosive nights
profile.spaces_zh: 图书馆四楼角落、咖啡厅靠窗位、校报编辑室
profile.spaces_en: Library 4F corner, cafe window seat, newspaper office
profile.long_desire_zh: 保持创作状态，积累可讲述的生活素材
profile.long_desire_en: Stay in creative mode, collect narratable life material
profile.short_goal_zh: 找一个安静但有人流的地方观察别人并记笔记
profile.short_goal_en: Find a quiet-yet-populated place to observe people and take notes
profile.constraint_zh: 刚起床精神还没进入状态；下午有编辑会
profile.constraint_en: Still groggy after waking; editorial meeting in the afternoon
profile.bias_zh: 倾向把人多的地方看成素材丰富；容易高估眼前灵感价值
profile.bias_en: Tends to treat crowded places as rich material; overvalues passing inspiration
profile.narrative_zh: 我不是在发呆，我是在采集素材
profile.narrative_en: I'm not zoning out, I'm collecting material
